docs.title: About me
docs.text: libdmmy (Dummy Yenko). Not a big fan of touching grass, but a big fan of coding and Minecraft...

docs.title: Redmi Note 8 (ginkgo)
docs.text:
Main phone. Has ArrowOS 11, fastest ROM for this device, installed. Doesn't have any GApps, because it does much useless stuff at the background.

Fun fact

I've hard-bricked it when flashed too old version of MIUI.

docs.title: PC (potato)
docs.text:
Main PC with ancient parts. Intel i3-2100, NVIDIA GT440, 8GB of RAM. Works smooth for me, because I haven't tried anything better. However, Linux sucks on it, because of ancient NVIDIA graphics card. But Windows works just fine (Windows 7 is fastest for it, but it's too old).

Fun fact

After two years, SSD still lives, even after reinstalling OSes every two weeks, because I'm getting bored.

docs.title: Redmi 7A (pine)
docs.text: Second phone. Using it as a hotspot, a way to use apps for normies (e.g. banking, WhatsApp, school stuff) and just a fallback, when something will go wrong on ginkgo. Yes, I take two phones when I need to go somewhere.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
Create a new session:

tmux new -s your_session_name

Get in that session:

tmux at -t your_session_name
